patches.description: Enable the local SONATA report shim and LFP gid-order fixes.
Keep GPU LFP parity and final CoreNEURON data return correct.
Apply NVHPC/Eigen/Python compatibility fixes needed by OBGPU.
Allow the pinned Random123 PGI/NVHPC feature header to build correctly on aarch64.
Add the bundled SONATA shim header so clean builds do not depend on untracked vendor files.
Make CoreNEURON output_spikes compile reliably with the bundled SONATA shim under NVHPC/aarch64.
Keep the local SONATA report shim linked only against CoreNEURON MPI symbols so libcorenrnmech loads cleanly.
Keep the upstream demo-release mechanism build out of the default target graph so cluster builds do not fail on its separate nrnivmodl environment.
Link nocmodl against libstdc++fs on GCC 8 so std::filesystem path handling does not crash during MOD translation.
Link nmodl against libstdc++fs on GCC 8 so CoreNEURON MOD translation does not crash during setup.
Link nrniv_lib against libstdc++fs on GCC 8 so nrniv -python does not crash during Python startup.
